title: Inbound Follow activity + auto-Accept
description: Handle inbound Follow activities from remote actors targeting local personas. If the target account has is_locked=false, auto-accept: create a followers row and send an Accept{Follow} activity back. If is_locked=true, create a follow_requests row instead. The Accept activity must be delivered to the requester's inbox.
design: Mastodon sends Follow where object is sometimes a full object, sometimes a URI string — handle both shapes. This is the single most common bug in AP implementations. Accept activity: {type:Accept, actor:{local_actor_uri}, object:{original_follow_activity}}. Enqueue Accept to delivery_queue targeting requester's inbox.
acceptance_criteria: Remote Mastodon user follows local persona and receives Accept notification within 60s; locked persona creates follow_request row instead; Follow with object as URI string is handled (Mastodon quirk); duplicate Follow is idempotent
